orchestrator.description: Primary agent that understands user requests, inspects project context, breaks work into stages, delegates analysis to read-only subagents, assigns implementation to builder subagents after approval, and produces a final summary.

erp-repo-explorer.description: Read-only repository exploration. Finds relevant files, maps dependencies, identifies patterns, reports exact paths.

erp-backend-architect.description: Read-only backend architecture analysis. Checks Clean Architecture, DI, repositories, routes, Firebase, Prisma-readiness, auth, tenant context.

erp-frontend-architect.description: Read-only frontend architecture analysis. Checks routing, contexts, API client, permissions, modules, sidebar, Super Admin isolation, RTL/theme.

erp-api-contract.description: Read-only API contract analysis. Checks routes, DTOs, frontend API calls, backend handlers, request/response alignment.

erp-backend-builder.description: Backend implementation agent. Can edit backend files only after orchestrator gives clear scope. Must follow existing patterns.

erp-frontend-builder.description: Frontend implementation agent. Can edit frontend files only after orchestrator gives clear scope. Must follow existing patterns.

erp-reviewer.description: Strict read-only code reviewer. Checks diffs for bugs, broken imports, TypeScript errors, security issues, RBAC mistakes, tenant isolation, architecture violations.

erp-test-runner.description: Runs approved verification commands: git status, git diff, npm run build, npm run typecheck, npm run test. Does not edit files. Summarizes failures clearly.
